damage.value: bite & constriction d10+3 (hand, close, forceful, grabby)

system.concept: A vain, hypnotic serpent with a simian head that enthralls the weak-willed.
system.tags: solitary, large, construct, corrupted, stealthy, magical, devious, cautious, hoarder
system.description: Swyn are great serpents with simian heads and hypnotic eyes. The Green Lords bred them out of desperation, borrowing secrets from the Things Below; they wanted spymasters and saboteurs, and what they got was a race of petty, craven narcissists. Each swyn fancies itself the greatest and most beautiful of beings — but embarrass, defy, or simply bore one and expect to be brutally devoured. The Fae hunt them, and they shun their own kind, but every dozen years some urge drives them all to the ruins of Vor Svetelik for ostentatious displays and mating rituals.

items.name: Appear out of nowhere and lock eyes
Hold its prey fast with gaze and soothing words
Plant a suggestion in its victim's mind
Turn the weak-willed into fawning servants
